title: Crypto Miner Hive CEO Anticipates $100M Annual Revenue from GPU Computing
text: HIVE Digital Technologies CEO Aydin Kilic stated in an interview that the company anticipates $100 million in annual revenue from GPU computing operations. The company's strategic pivot toward AI and high-performance computing reflects changing market dynamics and the growing demand for GPU-based infrastructure. BUZZ, HIVE's HPC subsidiary, has demonstrated strong traction with early customer deployments and significant contract wins. The company is aggressively scaling its GPU fleet to meet anticipated demand. CEO Kilic noted that the transformation toward a dual-engine business model positions HIVE to capitalize on multiple revenue streams including Bitcoin mining and AI infrastructure services. The company's investments in renewable energy infrastructure in Paraguay and Canada provide a competitive advantage in delivering cost-efficient AI computing services. Early results from BUZZ deployments exceeded internal expectations with strong customer retention and expansion opportunities.
